panels.title: MQTT Live Stream (real-time verification)
panels.description: Data coming directly from MQTT broker. If this shows data but InfluxDB panels don't, the problem is in the InfluxDB writer.

panels.title: InfluxDB Stored Data (verification)
panels.description: Data read from InfluxDB. Compare with MQTT panel above — should match with slight delay.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_tags")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: MQTT Messages per Topic (live)
panels.description: Number of MQTT messages received since dashboard load. If 0, the poller is not publishing.

panels.title: InfluxDB Write Rate (points/min)
panels.description: How many data points InfluxDB received in the last minute.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_tags")
  |> group()
  |> count()

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_health")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "latency_ms")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_health")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "status")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: InfluxDB Bucket Sizes
panels.description: Data stored in each retention bucket.

targets.query:
import "array"
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"

raw = from(bucket: "plc4x_raw") |> range(start: -24h) |> group() |> count() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: r._value, bucket: "plc4x_raw (90d)"}))
hourly = from(bucket: "plc4x_hourly") |> range(start: -24h) |> group() |> count() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: r._value, bucket: "plc4x_hourly (2y)"}))
daily = from(bucket: "plc4x_daily") |> range(start: -24h) |> group() |> count() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: r._value, bucket: "plc4x_daily (forever)"}))

union(tables: [raw, hourly, daily])
